cd /mnt/c/Users/pavit/OneDrive/Desktop/HPC

serial

gcc serial_matrix.c -o serial_matrix
./serial_matrix

OpenMP

gcc -fopenmp openmp_matrix.c -o openmp_matrix
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=4
./openmp_matrix

MPI

mpicc mpi_matrix.c -o mpi_matrix
mpirun -np 4 ./mpi_matrix

Hybrid
mpicc -fopenmp hybrid_matrix.c -o hybrid_matrix
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=2
mpirun -np 2 ./hybrid_matrix


python3 rmse_check.py
